title: Bullshoot
wikitext:
[]: Bullshoot             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Fri Jul 07, 2017 11:46 pm So, uh, ADV re-recorded a line in the dub of Episode 5 to have Shinji drop a BS bomb. This was years after the original release. Why would they do that? Shinji saying "bullshit" to two adults/his superiors feels OOC, and it lessens the shock of his F bomb drop in EoE.

[]: Re: Bullshoot             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Jul 08, 2017 12:40 am Tumbling Down wrote: Why would they do that?

[]: Re: Bullshoot             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Sat Jul 08, 2017 7:30 pm They could also have the characters belch and fart.

[]: Re: Bullshoot             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jul 08, 2017 7:32 pm Don't give them any ideas.

[]: Re: Bullshoot             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Jul 09, 2017 12:17 am I'm imagining one of the "Oh shit the greebledeelbles are fuzzywatzing!" bridge bunny panic scenes with all the dialogue replaced with belches.
